  "complexity_notes": "This is an OpenAPI specification document defining a REST API for a Task Manager system. Key characteristics: (1) API Version: 2.4.1 with 3 server environments (production, staging, local); (2) Security: Dual authentication via Bearer JWT and API Key; (3) Core Resources: Tasks, Assignments, Comments, Attachments with full CRUD operations; (4) Advanced Features: Full-text search, batch operations (up to 50 tasks), pagination (1-100 items per page); (5) Endpoints: 11 main paths covering task lifecycle, comments, attachments, search, and batch operations; (6) Data Schemas: 13 defined schemas including Task, Comment, Attachment, User, with comprehensive validation rules; (7) Error Handling: Standardized ErrorResponse with request tracking; (8) Constraints: File uploads limited to 25MB, comment body max 10,000 chars, task title max 200 chars; (9) Status Enums: 6 task statuses (open, in_progress, in_review, blocked, done, cancelled) and 4 priority levels (low, medium, high, critical); (10) Response Patterns: Consistent pagination structure, Location headers for created resources, detailed error responses with field-level validation details."
